title: Agavesol’s Anti-Itch Cream is Graaff-Reinet’s own natural wonder
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Agavesol Anti-Itch Cream contains only two ingredients, Agave hydrosol, and a thickener, widely used in cosmetics and hair conditioners, which has been approved by the European health commission.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Agavesol Anti-Itch Cream contains only two ingredients, Agave hydrosol, and a thickener, widely used in cosmetics and hair conditioners, which has been approved by the European health commission."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Bio-Chemistry Department at Stellenbosch University under leadership of Prof. Marietjie Stander, identified the constituents in the Agave hydrosol, which are a methoxypyrazine, and a methoxyphenol. This specific methoxyphenol has been tested on mice, and it was proved that it healed skin cancer found on mice ears.","html":"The Bio-Chemistry Department at Stellenbosch University under leadership of Prof. Marietjie Stander, identified the constituents in the Agave hydrosol, which are a methoxypyrazine, and a methoxyphenol. This specific methoxyphenol has been tested on mice, and it was proved that it healed skin cancer found on mice ears."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"A doctor at the Tygerberg Hospital’s Burn Unit has tested the Agavesol Anti-Itch Cream on burn patients, and found that it promoted healing and had no deleterious effects."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Many people who have applied the cream to sunburn, scalds or other burn wounds can attest to its efficacy in calming the pain and healing the burns amazingly quickly.","html":"Many people who have applied the cream to sunburn, scalds or other burn wounds can attest to its efficacy in calming the pain and healing the burns amazingly quickly."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Agave plants distilled to produce Agave hydrosol are grown on two farms in the Graaff-Reinet district, Roodebloem and Bloemhof. The distilling is done on Roodebloem, which means the Agavesol Anti-Itch Cream is a product indigenous to Graaff-Reinet.","html":"The Agave plants distilled to produce Agave hydrosol are grown on two farms in the Graaff-Reinet district, Roodebloem and Bloemhof. The distilling is done on Roodebloem, which means the Agavesol Anti-Itch Cream is a product indigenous to Graaff-Reinet."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We have been selling the Anti-Itch Cream since 2016, and have not received one complaint about a bad reaction, while many satisfied customers have reacted with glowing testimonials. Rob Erasmus, a member of the Wildfire Fighters in Cape Town is one of the very happy customers, because he always has a tube of our cream with him when he goes out to fight a wildfire to treat any burns he might acquire.","html":"We have been selling the Anti-Itch Cream since 2016, and have not received one complaint about a bad reaction, while many satisfied customers have reacted with glowing testimonials. Rob Erasmus, a member of the Wildfire Fighters in Cape Town is one of the very happy customers, because he always has a tube of our cream with him when he goes out to fight a wildfire to treat any burns he might acquire."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"What are the uses of pyrazine in medicine?A pyrazine is a heterocyclic aromatic organic compound with the chemical formula C4H4N2. It is a proteasome inhibitor used to treat multiple myeloma in patients who have not been successfully treated with at least two previous therapies. It is also an antituberculosis agent used as a component of tuberculosis (TB) treatment.","html":"What are the uses of pyrazine in medicine?
A pyrazine is a heterocyclic aromatic organic compound with the chemical formula C4H4N2. It is a proteasome inhibitor used to treat multiple myeloma in patients who have not been successfully treated with at least two previous therapies. It is also an antituberculosis agent used as a component of tuberculosis (TB) treatment."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pyrazine compounds comprise a variety of pharmacological action, including antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, analgesic, anticancer, antibacterial, and antioxidant activity.","html":"Pyrazine compounds comprise a variety of pharmacological action, including antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, analgesic, anticancer, antibacterial, and antioxidant activity."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Visit www.agavesol.co.za for more information, or to shop the wide range of Agavesol pain relief, skin care, self care and animal care products online.","html":"Visit www.agavesol.co.za for more information, or to shop the wide range of Agavesol pain relief, skin care, self care and animal care products online."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Agavesol’s Anti-Itch Cream is Graaff-Reinet’s own natural wonder
